title: Recommended Cash Acquisition Announcement
text: Helix Holdings Ltd has agreed to acquire Northbridge Software plc by scheme of arrangement. Northbridge shareholders will receive 620 pence in cash for each Northbridge share. The acquisition implies an equity value of approximately GBP 1.24 billion.

title: Recommended Cash Acquisition Announcement
text: The acquisition is intended to be implemented by a court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement. Completion is expected in the fourth quarter of 2026, subject to shareholder approval, court sanction and regulatory clearances.

title: Scheme Document
text: The scheme meeting and general meeting will be held on 20 August 2026. Approval requires the relevant shareholder majorities specified in the scheme document.

title: Scheme Document
text: The long-stop date is 15 December 2026. If the scheme has not become effective by that date, the acquisition will lapse unless Helix and Northbridge agree an extension with the required consent.

title: Financing Confirmation
text: Helix confirms that committed financing is available to satisfy the cash consideration in full. The acquisition is not conditional on financing.

title: Regulatory Update
text: Clearance from the Competition and Markets Authority remains outstanding. The current Phase 1 statutory deadline is 15 September 2026. Helix stated that it continues to engage constructively with the authority.

title: Northbridge Trading Update
text: Northbridge reported that current trading remains in line with the board's expectations. The board stated that the trading update does not change its recommendation of the acquisition.
